_note: Ranking/countdown thumbnails: subject with tiered/stacked items or characters arranged to imply ranking. The 'BEST WEAPONS' / 'TOP 5 BUILDS' / '10 THINGS YOU MISSED' category — high CTR format. Composition emphasizes vertical hierarchy or grid arrangement with the #1 item prominent.
template: {game} video game key art: {subject} surrounded by ranked {ranked_items} arranged in a dramatic tier display, glowing #{rank_focus} item the largest and most prominent, recognizable {game} setting and art style, {palette} palette, {lighting}, numbered ranking energy, dramatic depth, clean zone for composited list title
negative: text, letters, words, numbers, watermark, blurry, low contrast, generic, unrelated game, flat composition

rubric.ranking_clarity: 1-5 — does it read as a ranked list?
